title: High-Yield Dragon Fruit (Hylocereus)
description: Premium exotic farming with 3x ROI compared to traditional cereals. Requires trellis support and minimal water.

title: Commercial Hydroponic Lettuce
description: Zero-soil precision farming for urban premium markets. Year-round production (12 harvests).

title: Malabar Neem (Melia Dubia)
description: Fast-growing timber for plywood industry. Harvestable in 5-7 years with 5L+ potential per acre.
